summary: Iteration 29: Tested Team Members Page with 3 display modes (Individual, Team Structure, Division Hierarchy). Backend: 20/24 tests passed (4 skipped due to management credential issue - mdiane.gm@slmco.local not working). All 5 endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All features verified - view selector dropdown, profile cards with avatar initials, profile detail overlay with stats toggle, navigation accessible for both owner and management roles.

seed_data_creation: Updated profile extras for crew_000a07ca (age: 35) and member_ef04449f (avatar_url) during PATCH tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified Team Members Page: (1) GET /api/team/profiles returns unified profiles from users, crew_access_links, crew_members collections with profile_id format: user_{id}, crew_{code}, member_{code}. (2) GET /api/team/profiles/{profile_id} returns single profile with stats (review_count, submission_count, training_total, training_completed). (3) PATCH /api/team/profiles/{profile_id} updates age/avatar_url in team_profile_extras collection. (4) GET /api/team/structure returns teams grouped by crew leader with nested members array. (5) GET /api/team/hierarchy returns full org hierarchy (owners, general_managers, account_managers, production_managers, supervisors, divisions with teams). Frontend: TeamMembersPage at /team-members with view selector dropdown (Individual/Team Structure/Division Hierarchy). Individual view shows carousel rows with profile cards. Team Structure shows crew leader cards with nested member lists. Division Hierarchy shows full org chart. Profile detail overlay opens on card click with Performance & Records toggle showing stats grid. Navigation sidebar shows Team Members link for both management and owner roles.

frontend_individual_view.default_view: PASS - Individual view shown by default

frontend_navigation.management_sidebar: PASS - Team Members link visible between Alignment & QR and Review Queue
